en.title: Best Electrolyte Drink Mixes 2026
en.description: The electrolyte powders and tablets I trust to rehydrate through a 2026 heatwave, ranked by sodium load, absorption science, taste, and cost per serving.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳電解質補水粉排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 熱浪下我真心會回購的電解質補水粉與發泡錠，用鈉含量、吸收科學、口味與每份成本排出高下。

en.description: 1,000mg sodium, 200mg potassium and 60mg magnesium per stick with zero sugar and no dyes, the highest sodium load of any mainstream mix.

zh-tw.description: 每包 1,000 毫克鈉、200 毫克鉀、60 毫克鎂，零糖無色素，鈉含量是主流補水粉最高的一款。

en.description: Built on the WHO oral rehydration framework with sodium, glucose and potassium co-transport, plus a sugar-free allulose version for daily drinkers.

zh-tw.description: 以 WHO 口服補液框架設計，鈉、葡萄糖、鉀協同運輸加速吸收，另有無糖阿洛酮糖版給每天喝的人。

en.description: 400mg sodium and 200mg potassium in a clean 2:1 ratio, sugar-free, with 65 trace minerals, coconut water and Informed Sport banned-substance testing.

zh-tw.description: 400 毫克鈉配 200 毫克鉀的乾淨 2:1 比例，無糖，含 65 種微量礦物質與椰子水，通過 Informed Sport 禁藥檢驗。

en.description: The reference effervescent tablet, 300mg sodium and 150mg potassium with just 1g sugar, dropping into any bottle for grab-and-go hydration.

zh-tw.description: 發泡錠的標竿，300 毫克鈉配 150 毫克鉀，只有 1 克糖，丟進任何水瓶就能喝，隨身超方便。

en.description: A medical-grade oral rehydration solution designed by a physician, delivering triple the electrolytes and half the sugar of a typical sports drink.

zh-tw.description: 醫師開發的醫療級口服補液配方，電解質是一般運動飲料的三倍、糖只有一半，脫水急救很有感。

en.description: 380mg sodium with real dried fruit and a light 15g of real sugar for glucose-driven absorption during long endurance efforts.

zh-tw.description: 380 毫克鈉搭配真實果乾與 15 克天然糖，靠葡萄糖驅動吸收，長時間耐力運動補給很搭。

en.description: Zero sugar and zero calories with 250mg potassium and 100mg magnesium, the everyday sipper for people who want minerals without the salt hit.

zh-tw.description: 零糖零卡，250 毫克鉀配 100 毫克鎂，適合想補礦物質又不想吃太鹹的人，每天喝的日常款。

en.description: 810mg sodium sourced from Redmond Real Salt with a full electrolyte spread, the value pick for anyone chasing LMNT-level salt for less.

zh-tw.description: 用 Redmond 天然海鹽提供 810 毫克鈉，電解質齊全，想要接近 LMNT 高鈉又想省錢的人首選。

en.description: Coconut water base with a WHO oral rehydration ratio, plant-based and no added sugar, the cleanest-label option in the field.

zh-tw.description: 椰子水基底搭配 WHO 口服補液比例，植物性、無添加糖，成分表最乾淨的一款。

en.description: 250mg sodium with just 4g sugar and NSF Certified for Sport testing, a lighter, cleaner take for people who find Liquid I.V. too sweet.

zh-tw.description: 250 毫克鈉只配 4 克糖，通過 NSF Certified for Sport 檢驗，嫌 Liquid I.V. 太甜的人可以換這款。

references.title: 7 Best Electrolyte Powder of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
Best Electrolyte Powders 2026
We tested 20 electrolyte powders — these 8 are the best

en.commentary: This is the category I lean on hardest in July, and after a summer of hauling sticks to the gym, on trails and into a car that hits 40C by noon, my order is settled. LMNT takes the top spot because its 1,000mg sodium per stick is the number that actually matters when you are sweating through a shirt, and the zero-sugar, dye-free formula means I can drink four a day without a gut ache or a crash. It costs more per serving, and it earns it. Liquid I.V. lands second as the smartest everyday pick: its WHO-based oral rehydration ratio genuinely pulls water into you faster than plain water, and the new allulose sugar-free version finally fixes my one complaint. Sports Research Hydrate is the value story of 2026, a clean 2:1 sodium-to-potassium formula that carries Informed Sport testing at a price the boutique brands cannot match. Nuun Sport stays essential for portability, a tablet you drop in any bottle with only 1g of sugar. The bottom of this list is still strong. My honest advice: match the mix to the sweat. Heavy heat and long efforts want LMNT or Re-Lyte, daily desk hydration wants Ultima or Cure.

highlights.title: LMNT wins because 1,000mg of sodium is the whole point
highlights.body: When you sweat hard in real heat, sodium is the electrolyte you lose most and need back fastest. LMNT delivers 1,000mg per stick, more than triple what most competitors offer, with zero sugar and no artificial dyes to get in the way. I have run through 40C afternoons on LMNT and stayed sharp, where lighter mixes left me with a headache by hour three. It is the mix I hand to anyone doing physical work in summer.

highlights.title: Liquid I.V. is the everyday hydrator with the best science
highlights.body: Liquid I.V. is built on the World Health Organization oral rehydration framework, using sodium and glucose co-transport to move water across the gut wall faster than water alone. That mechanism is real and clinically grounded. The new allulose sugar-free line keeps the absorption benefit while cutting the 11g of sugar that used to hold it back, which is why it jumps to my number two for daily drinking.

highlights.title: Sports Research Hydrate is the value champion of 2026
highlights.body: A clean 400mg sodium to 200mg potassium ratio, sugar-free, loaded with 65 trace minerals and coconut water, and Informed Sport certified for banned substances. At $22.95 for 16 packets it undercuts every boutique competitor while carrying the testing credential athletes actually need. If you want most of what LMNT offers for less money, this is where I would start.

highlights.title: Match the sodium to your sweat, not the hype
highlights.body: The single biggest mistake I see is people buying maximum-sodium mixes for a desk day, then feeling bloated and salty. If you sweat heavily or train long in heat, reach for LMNT or Re-Lyte. If you want gentle daily minerals at your desk, Ultima and Cure deliver potassium and magnesium with almost no sodium load. The right pick depends entirely on how much salt you are actually losing.

highlights.title: Subscriptions are where the real value lives
highlights.body: Every top brand here rewards a subscription, and the discount is large enough to change the ranking on cost. LMNT drops from $1.50 to under $1.00 per stick on its bundle plans, and Sports Research and Ultima both cut meaningfully with recurring delivery. If you drink electrolytes daily through summer, set up a subscription and pause it in winter. That single move makes the premium picks genuinely affordable.

zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，這個品類是我七月最依賴的東西。整個夏天我把補水粉帶去健身房、帶上步道、丟進中午就飆到快 40 度的車裡，喝到現在名次我已經很篤定。LMNT 穩坐第一，因為它每包 1,000 毫克鈉，這個數字在你整件衣服都濕透的時候才是真的有用，而且零糖無色素，我一天喝四包也不會脹氣或血糖崩。每份是貴一點，但它撐得起這個價。Liquid I.V. 排第二，是最聰明的日常選擇，它用 WHO 口服補液比例，真的把水拉進身體的速度比白開水快，新的阿洛酮糖無糖版更是把我唯一的抱怨補起來了。Sports Research Hydrate 是 2026 的性價比故事，乾淨的 2:1 鈉鉀比還過了 Informed Sport 檢驗，價格卻壓在精品品牌打不到的位置。Nuun Sport 靠隨身性穩住第四，一顆發泡錠丟進任何水瓶只有 1 克糖。講白了我的建議就一句，看你流多少汗選粉。大熱天跟長時間運動就上 LMNT 或 Re-Lyte，坐辦公室日常補水挑 Ultima 或 Cure 就夠。

highlights.title: LMNT 贏在 1,000 毫克鈉，這才是重點
highlights.body: 真的在熱天狂流汗時，鈉是你流失最多、最需要補回來的電解質。LMNT 每包給你 1,000 毫克，是多數對手的三倍以上，還零糖無人工色素，喝起來沒有雜味。我在快 40 度的午後靠 LMNT 撐過整場，腦袋還是清楚的，換成鈉含量低的粉，第三小時就開始頭痛。夏天要做粗重工作或戶外活動，我就是遞這款給人。

highlights.title: Liquid I.V. 是科學最扎實的日常補水款
highlights.body: Liquid I.V. 建立在世界衛生組織的口服補液框架上，用鈉與葡萄糖的協同運輸把水推過腸壁，吸收速度贏過純水。這個機制是有臨床根據的真材實料。新的阿洛酮糖無糖版保留了吸收優勢，又砍掉過去 11 克糖那個扣分點，所以它在我心中日常喝的排名直接跳到第二。

highlights.title: Sports Research Hydrate 是 2026 的性價比冠軍
highlights.body: 乾淨的 400 毫克鈉配 200 毫克鉀比例，無糖，塞了 65 種微量礦物質跟椰子水，還通過 Informed Sport 禁藥檢驗。16 包 22.95 美元的價格打趴每一個精品對手，還帶著運動員真正需要的檢驗認證。想用更少的錢拿到接近 LMNT 的東西，我會從這款開始試。

highlights.title: 看流汗量選鈉含量，別跟著行銷走
highlights.body: 我看過最常見的錯誤，就是坐辦公室的人買最高鈉的粉，結果喝到又脹又鹹。你如果流汗量大或在熱天長時間訓練，就拿 LMNT 或 Re-Lyte。你如果只是想在辦公桌補點礦物質，Ultima 跟 Cure 提供鉀跟鎂又幾乎沒有鈉負擔。選哪款完全看你實際流失多少鹽分。

highlights.title: 訂閱制才是真正省錢的地方
highlights.body: 這裡每個頂尖品牌都給訂閱優惠，而且折扣大到會改變成本排名。LMNT 走組合訂閱方案能從每包 1.5 美元壓到 1 美元以下，Sports Research 跟 Ultima 定期配送也都省得有感。你如果整個夏天每天喝電解質，就設個訂閱，冬天再暫停。光這一招就讓那些高價款變得真的付得起。

references.title: We tested 20 electrolyte powders: these 8 are the best
7 Best Electrolyte Powder of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
LMNT vs Liquid IV: A Dietitian's Honest Comparison

en.commentary: With summer training in full heat, LMNT Recharge stays my number one, and the reason is simple physiology: 1,000mg of sodium per stick, zero sugar, and a clean label. If you sweat buckets on long efforts in the heat, that is the mix that actually keeps you upright, and I have leaned on it through back-to-back hot sessions without the usual afternoon crash. Liquid IV holds second for the opposite crowd, its glucose-sodium transport formula pulls water in fast, which makes it my pick for a rough morning or a travel day. Sports Research Hydrate and Nuun Sport sit just behind because they nail the everyday balance: solid third-party testing, sensible sodium, and a taste you will actually reach for. I made no ranking changes this week. Reviewers keep echoing the same split I already have baked in, LMNT for heavy sweaters and endurance work, a gentler all-rounder like Ultima or Nuun for daily sipping, so there is nothing here that justifies moving a rank. Buy to your sweat rate. If your shirt is soaked and crusted with salt after a workout, go LMNT or Relyte for the high sodium. If you just want clean daily hydration that tastes good and costs less, Nuun and Ultima earn their spots near the middle.

highlights.title: LMNT for heavy sweaters
highlights.body: 1,000mg sodium, zero sugar, clean label. On long hot efforts it is the mix that actually keeps me upright, so it stays first.

highlights.title: Liquid IV for fast rehydration
highlights.body: The glucose-sodium transport formula pulls water in quickly, my pick for a rough morning or a travel day.

highlights.title: Everyday balance in the middle
highlights.body: Sports Research Hydrate and Nuun Sport nail third-party testing, sensible sodium, and a taste you will reach for.

highlights.title: No moves this week
highlights.body: Reviews keep echoing the split already baked into the list, so nothing justified changing a rank.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏天訓練正熱，LMNT Recharge 還是我心中第一，理由很單純，就是生理學：一包 1,000mg 鈉、零糖、成分乾淨。如果你在高溫下做長時間運動、汗流成河，這款才是真的能讓你不倒下的補給，我連續好幾天在大熱天做完課表，也沒出現下午那種虛脫感。Liquid IV 穩在第二，是給另一群人用的，它那套葡萄糖加鈉的運輸配方能快速把水拉進體內，宿醉隔天早上或是搭一整天車，我會選它。Sports Research Hydrate 跟 Nuun Sport 緊跟在後，因為它們把日常平衡抓得很準：第三方檢驗紮實、鈉量合理、味道是你會主動想喝的那種。這週我沒有動排名。各家評測一直在講的，就是我早就寫進榜單的那個分野，重度流汗跟耐力運動選 LMNT，日常小口補水就挑 Ultima 或 Nuun 這種溫和全能款，所以沒有東西需要調動名次。照你的排汗量買。運動完衣服濕透還結一層鹽，就上 LMNT 或 Relyte 補高鈉。只想要乾淨、好喝、又便宜一點的日常補水，Nuun 跟 Ultima 站在中段是實至名歸。

highlights.title: LMNT 給爆汗族
highlights.body: 一包 1,000mg 鈉、零糖、成分乾淨。高溫長時間運動時它是真的讓我不倒的那款，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 快速補水
highlights.body: 葡萄糖加鈉的運輸配方能快速把水拉進體內，宿醉早上或搭車整天我選它。

highlights.title: 中段的日常平衡
highlights.body: Sports Research Hydrate 跟 Nuun Sport 把第三方檢驗、合理鈉量、好味道都抓得很準。

highlights.title: 這週不動
highlights.body: 評測一直重複我早就寫進榜單的分野，沒有東西需要調名次。

references.title: 7 Best Electrolyte Powder of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
We tested 20 electrolyte powders — these 8 are the best
LMNT vs Liquid IV: A Dietitian's Honest Comparison

en.commentary: LMNT stays my number one for the same reason it always earns it: 1,000mg of sodium per stick with zero sugar. For heavy sweaters, keto dieters, and anyone grinding long efforts in July heat, that high-sodium load is the whole point, and no mainstream mix matches it on electrolytes plus ingredient cleanliness. It is the mix I reach for after a hot ride. Liquid IV holds second, and this week I nudged its taste and cleanliness scores because the sugar-free version sweetened with allulose is genuinely good. That formula fixes my one long-standing gripe, the 11 grams of added sugar in the original, while keeping the balanced sodium-to-potassium ratio that suits everyday hydration for most people. If you want flavor and easy daily sipping over raw sodium, Liquid IV is the smarter pick. Sports Research and Nuun round out the top four because they nail the fundamentals: clean labels, solid third-party testing, and prices that make daily use painless. Sports Research in particular keeps the best value-plus-testing combination in this list. Below them the field is tightly packed, and I steer buyers by goal. Choose LMNT for maximum sodium, Liquid IV for taste and balance, Sports Research or Nuun for clean everyday hydration on a budget. No rank swaps this week, the order reflects what each mix is built to do.

highlights.title: LMNT owns the sodium crown
highlights.body: 1,000mg of sodium per stick with zero sugar makes it the pick for heavy sweaters and endurance efforts in summer heat.

highlights.title: Liquid IV's allulose version shines
highlights.body: The sugar-free formula keeps great taste and a balanced electrolyte ratio, so I raised its taste and cleanliness scores.

highlights.title: Sports Research leads on value plus testing
highlights.body: Clean labels and strong third-party testing at a low price keep it the smart everyday choice.

highlights.title: Match the mix to the goal
highlights.body: LMNT for maximum sodium, Liquid IV for taste and balance, Nuun and Sports Research for clean budget hydration.

zh-tw.commentary: LMNT 這週還是我的第一，理由跟以前一樣硬：一包 1000mg 鈉、零糖。對大量流汗的人、生酮飲食者、還有七月熱天裡跑長距離的人來說，這種高鈉補充就是重點，電解質加上成分乾淨度，沒有一款主流品牌追得上。熱天騎完車我第一個伸手拿的就是它。Liquid IV 守住第二，這週我把它的口味跟成分乾淨度分數往上調了一點，因為用阿洛酮糖做的無糖版本真的好喝。這個配方剛好解決我一直以來的抱怨，原版那 11 克添加糖，同時保留了鈉鉀比例均衡的特性，很適合一般人日常補水。如果你在意口味跟每天好入口勝過純鈉量，Liquid IV 是更聰明的選擇。Sports Research 跟 Nuun 撐起前四名，因為基本功都做得很扎實：標示乾淨、第三方檢測到位、價格也讓你天天喝不心疼。Sports Research 更是這份榜單裡檢測加性價比的最佳組合。再往下大家咬得很緊，我還是照目標推薦。要最高鈉選 LMNT，要口味跟均衡選 Liquid IV，要乾淨又日常又省錢選 Sports Research 或 Nuun。這週沒有換名次，這個排序反映的就是每款產品各自擅長什麼。

highlights.title: LMNT 拿下鈉含量王座
highlights.body: 一包 1000mg 鈉、零糖，是大量流汗跟夏天耐力運動的首選。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 阿洛酮糖版本亮眼
highlights.body: 無糖配方保留了好口味跟均衡的電解質比例，所以我把口味跟成分乾淨度分數往上調。

highlights.title: Sports Research 檢測加性價比領先
highlights.body: 標示乾淨、第三方檢測扎實、價格又低，是聰明的日常選擇。

highlights.title: 照目標挑產品
highlights.body: 要最高鈉選 LMNT，要口味跟均衡選 Liquid IV，要乾淨又省錢選 Nuun 或 Sports Research。

references.title: 7 Best Electrolyte Powder of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
Best Electrolyte Powders 2026
LMNT vs Liquid IV: A Dietitian's Honest Comparison

en.commentary: LMNT Recharge stays my number one, and mid-summer is exactly when its case is strongest. Each stick delivers 1,000mg of sodium with 200mg potassium and 60mg magnesium at zero sugar, and for heavy sweaters, keto dieters and anyone grinding through long efforts in July heat, that high-sodium load is the point. The clean label with no artificial additives keeps it my default for serious hydration. Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier holds second, and the story this cycle is its sugar-free version sweetened with allulose. It now matches the electrolyte profile of the original with zero added sugar, which fixes my one real reservation about the line. Reviewers keep calling it one of the best-tasting mixes on the market, so I raised its taste to 9.4 and its cleanliness to 8.2 to reflect the cleaner sugar-free formula. Its balanced sodium-to-potassium ratio still suits everyday hydration better than a hard workout. Sports Research Hydrate holds third as the value and third-party-testing standout, and Nuun Sport keeps fourth as the clean, lightly dosed tablet for casual daily sipping. DripDrop ORS stays fifth on its medical-grade absorption formula, the one I reach for when someone is actually sick or badly dehydrated. The honest split has not moved. LMNT is for heavy sweaters and endurance athletes who need real sodium. Liquid IV, especially the sugar-free version, is the more balanced everyday pick that most people will enjoy drinking. Match the mix to your sweat rate and you cannot go far wrong on this list.

highlights.title: LMNT owns summer sweat
highlights.body: LMNT Recharge stays first with 1,000mg sodium and zero sugar per stick, the high-sodium load heavy sweaters and endurance athletes need in July heat.

highlights.title: Liquid IV sugar-free upgrade
highlights.body: Liquid IV's allulose sugar-free version matches the original's electrolytes with zero added sugar, so I raised taste to 9.4 and cleanliness to 8.2 at second.

highlights.title: Sports Research for value
highlights.body: Sports Research Hydrate holds third as the value and third-party-testing standout, pairing solid electrolytes with a clean, well-verified label.

highlights.title: Match the mix to your sweat
highlights.body: LMNT suits heavy sweaters needing sodium, Liquid IV sugar-free suits balanced everyday hydration, and DripDrop is the pick when you are actually sick.

zh-tw.commentary: LMNT Recharge 續坐我的第一，而仲夏正是它最有說服力的時候。每一條給你 1,000 毫克鈉配 200 毫克鉀和 60 毫克鎂，零糖，對大量流汗的人、生酮飲食者，還有七月大熱天裡撐長時間運動的人，這種高鈉補充就是重點。無人工添加的乾淨成分表，讓它是我認真補水時的預設。Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier 守住第二，這一輪的重點是它用阿洛酮糖做的無糖版。它現在的電解質配置追平原版卻零添加糖，正好補上我對這個系列唯一的顧慮。評測一再說它是市面最好喝的粉之一，所以我把它的味道加到 9.4、成分乾淨度加到 8.2，反映更乾淨的無糖配方。它均衡的鈉鉀比，還是比較適合日常補水而非硬操。Sports Research Hydrate 守住第三，是性價比和第三方檢驗的亮點，Nuun Sport 守住第四，是乾淨、劑量輕的錠劑，適合平常隨手喝。DripDrop ORS 守住第五，靠它醫療級的吸收配方，是我在有人真的生病或嚴重脫水時會拿的那款。誠實的分法沒變。LMNT 給大量流汗和需要真正補鈉的耐力運動員。Liquid IV，尤其無糖版，是多數人會喜歡喝的均衡日常之選。照你的流汗量挑，這份榜單上很難挑錯。

highlights.title: LMNT 主宰夏天流汗
highlights.body: LMNT Recharge 每條 1,000 毫克鈉、零糖守住第一，這種高鈉補充正是大量流汗和耐力運動員七月大熱天需要的。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 無糖升級
highlights.body: Liquid IV 用阿洛酮糖的無糖版追平原版電解質卻零添加糖，我把味道加到 9.4、成分乾淨度加到 8.2，守在第二。

highlights.title: Sports Research 拚性價比
highlights.body: Sports Research Hydrate 守住第三，是性價比和第三方檢驗的亮點，把扎實電解質配上乾淨、驗證到位的成分表。

highlights.title: 照流汗量挑配方
highlights.body: LMNT 給大量流汗需要補鈉的人，Liquid IV 無糖版給均衡日常補水，DripDrop 則是真的生病時的選擇。

en.commentary: LMNT stays my number one this week, and the July testing rounds keep backing it. At 1,000mg of sodium, 200mg of potassium, and 60mg of magnesium with zero sugar, it is built for heavy sweaters and long training days, which is exactly the crowd that needs an electrolyte mix in summer. If you cramp on hot runs or work outdoors, this is the load that actually moves the needle. Liquid IV holds second because its WHO-style oral rehydration formula and Cellular Transport Technology genuinely speed water absorption, and the taste keeps casual users coming back day after day. Sports Research Hydrate stays my value and testing standout, with clean labeling and strong third-party verification at a price that makes daily use easy. Nuun keeps its spot for the tablet format that travels well in a gym bag, and DripDrop remains my pick when someone is recovering from illness or real dehydration thanks to its medical ORS roots. Further down, Ultima and Cure stay in the mix for anyone who wants clean ingredients and lighter sodium, while Relyte serves the high-sodium keto crowd. My advice this week is simple. Pick your sodium to match your sweat. LMNT for heavy loss and low-carb days, Liquid IV or DripDrop when absorption speed matters most, and Sports Research when you want clean testing without the premium price.

highlights.title: LMNT for heavy sweat
highlights.body: 1,000mg sodium with zero sugar makes it the load that actually helps on hot training days, which is why it holds my number one through summer.

highlights.title: Liquid IV wins on absorption
highlights.body: The WHO-style ORS formula and Cellular Transport Technology speed water uptake, and the taste keeps casual daily users loyal.

highlights.title: Sports Research is the value pick
highlights.body: Clean labeling and strong third-party testing at an everyday price keep it my recommendation for people who mix electrolytes daily.

highlights.title: DripDrop for real dehydration
highlights.body: Its medical ORS heritage makes it my choice for recovering from illness or serious fluid loss rather than routine hydration.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 LMNT 我還是放第一，七月的測試也一直在幫它背書。一包 1000 毫克鈉、200 毫克鉀、60 毫克鎂、零糖，就是為大汗族跟長時間訓練設計的，夏天最需要補電解質的就是這群人。如果你跑熱天長距離會抽筋，或是常在戶外做事，這個劑量才真的補得進去。Liquid IV 守第二，它走 WHO 口服補液的路子，加上細胞運輸技術，真的能加快水分吸收，而且味道好喝到會讓人天天想喝。Sports Research Hydrate 還是我在性價比跟檢驗這塊最推的，標示乾淨、第三方檢驗扎實，價格又親民到可以天天喝。Nuun 靠發泡錠的形式繼續留在名單裡，丟進健身包很方便。DripDrop 則是有人生病或真的脫水時我會拿出來的一款,因為它是醫療級 ORS 出身。再往下 Ultima 跟 Cure 適合想要成分乾淨、鈉量輕一點的人,Relyte 就給高鈉的生酮族。這週建議很簡單,鈉量要對得上你的流汗量,大量流失跟低碳日喝 LMNT,重視吸收速度就選 Liquid IV 或 DripDrop,想要檢驗乾淨又不想多花錢就挑 Sports Research。

highlights.title: LMNT 專治大汗
highlights.body: 1000 毫克鈉又零糖,熱天訓練真的補得進去,夏天穩住我的第一名。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 吸收最快
highlights.body: 走 WHO 口服補液配方加細胞運輸技術,水分吸收快,味道好喝讓人天天想補。

highlights.body: 標示乾淨、第三方檢驗扎實又親民,天天補電解質的人我最推它。

highlights.title: DripDrop 顧真脫水
highlights.body: 醫療級 ORS 出身,生病或嚴重流失水分時我會專門拿它來補,對付真脫水最對症。

en.commentary: LMNT Recharge stays at number one because it does exactly what a serious electrolyte mix should: replace what you lose when you sweat hard. At 1000mg of sodium per stick it carries the highest load of anything I test, double the next closest option, and that is precisely the point for endurance athletes, low-carb days, and brutal summer training. The clean label with no sugar and no artificial dyes seals it. What is new is that LMNT now ships a sparkling ready-to-drink can alongside the classic packets, which makes it easier to reach for on a hot afternoon. Liquid IV holds second on the strength of its absorption science and easily the best taste in the category, and its move to an allulose-sweetened sugar-free version plus expanded immune, energy, and sleep formulas keeps the lineup broad. Sports Research Hydrate stays third as the balanced everyday pick with strong third-party testing and real value. Nuun Sport remains my tablet of choice for portability and clean ingredients, while DripDrop keeps its medical-grade ORS ratio for anyone recovering from illness or heavy fluid loss. Skratch Labs continues to win on real-food flavor, Ultima on its clean zero-sodium-heavy profile for lighter needs, and Relyte, Cure, and Gnarly each cover specific niches from high-mineral loads to coconut-water bases. The category keeps splitting between high-sodium performance mixes and gentler daily hydration, and the rankings hold steady this week.

highlights.title: Highest sodium load, on purpose

zh-tw.commentary: LMNT Recharge 這週繼續拿第一，因為它把一款認真的電解質補充品該做的事做到極致，就是把你大量流汗掉的東西補回來。每包 1000 毫克鈉，是我測過含量最高的，比第二名還多一倍，而這正是重點所在，耐力運動、低碳日、夏天硬操訓練通通需要。無糖、無人工色素的乾淨配方更是加分。新消息是 LMNT 現在除了經典粉包，還推出氣泡即飲罐，大熱天下午隨手拿一罐更方便。第二名 Liquid IV 靠的是吸收科學跟這個類別裡最好喝的口味，加上改用阿洛酮糖的無糖版本，還有免疫、能量、助眠等擴充配方，產品線鋪得很廣。第三名 Sports Research Hydrate 是均衡的日常首選，第三方檢測扎實，價格也實在。Nuun Sport 還是我最愛的錠劑，好攜帶又成分乾淨。DripDrop 維持醫療級的 ORS 比例，生病或大量脫水時很好用。Skratch Labs 靠真食物風味取勝，Ultima 走清爽低鈉路線適合需求輕的人，Relyte、Cure、Gnarly 各守一塊，從高礦物質到椰子水基底都有。這個類別持續分成高鈉運動型跟溫和日常補水型兩派，排名這週維持穩定。

highlights.title: 刻意做到最高鈉含量
highlights.body: LMNT 每包 1000 毫克鈉，比第二名多一倍。對大量流汗跟夏天長時間運動的人來說這就是重點，讓它穩坐第一。

en.commentary: LMNT Recharge stays my number one because summer is exactly when its 1,000mg sodium load earns its keep, and the July dietitian comparisons keep pointing the same way. For heavy sweaters, endurance athletes, and anyone training through a hot week, that high sodium plus a genuinely clean label, zero sugar, no artificial sweeteners, just two grams of carbs, is the combination I want when I am actually depleted. The catch is the same one every reviewer flags, the salty taste takes some getting used to, which is why I hold its taste score where it is rather than pushing it higher. Liquid IV holds second because it solves a different problem well. Its 500mg sodium with 380mg potassium and added B and C vitamins goes down easy and fast, and that easy palatability is why casual users reach for it day after day. It is the mix I hand someone who wants hydration without a learning curve. Sports Research Hydrate keeps third on the strength of its third-party testing and value, a combination that matters more than people admit when you are buying a tub you will drink from for two months. I made no rank changes this cycle. The recent taste-test noise around newer entrants like Freaks of Nature is worth watching, but nothing has landed with the data to move a spot yet. Match the mix to the job, high sodium when you are truly sweating it out, easy flavor when you just need to drink more water, and let third-party testing break any tie.

highlights.title: LMNT owns the summer use case
highlights.body: The 1,000mg sodium dose is built for heavy sweaters and endurance sessions, and this month's dietitian comparisons keep confirming it is the mix to reach for when you are genuinely depleted.

highlights.title: Liquid IV wins on easy drinking
highlights.body: Its lighter 500mg sodium, added potassium, and B and C vitamins go down fast and pleasantly, which is why it stays my pick for people who just want to hydrate without acquiring a taste.

highlights.title: Sports Research is the value play
highlights.body: Third-party testing plus a strong price keep it in third. When you are buying a two-month tub, verified quality and cost per serving matter more than a flashy label.

highlights.title: Watching the newcomers
highlights.body: Recent taste tests are buzzing about entrants like Freaks of Nature, but none has arrived with the data to justify moving a rank, so the top ten holds steady this cycle.

zh-tw.commentary: LMNT Recharge 我還是擺第一，因為夏天正是它一包 1000 毫克鈉發揮價值的時候，七月營養師的比較也都指向同一個方向。對大量流汗的人、耐力運動員，還有在熱到爆的一週裡照練的人來說，高鈉再加上真的乾淨的成分表，零糖、無人工甜味劑、碳水只有兩克，這組合就是我真正流失電解質時想要的。它的問題大家都點名同一個，鹹味要花點時間習慣，所以它的口味分數我維持原樣，沒有往上拉。Liquid IV 守住第二，因為它把另一個問題解得很好。500 毫克鈉配 380 毫克鉀，再加 B 群跟維他命 C，入口順又快，就是這個好喝，讓一般人天天都想拿它。有人想補水又不想適應怪味，我就遞這包給他。Sports Research Hydrate 穩坐第三，靠的是第三方檢驗跟 CP 值，這組合比大家願意承認的還重要，畢竟你買的是一罐要喝兩個月的粉。這一輪我沒換名次。最近像 Freaks of Nature 這些新面孔在試喝評比上很吵，值得盯著看，但還沒有哪個帶著能撼動名次的數據殺進來。挑對場合就好，真的在飆汗就用高鈉，只是想多喝水就選好入口的，平手時就讓第三方檢驗來裁決。

highlights.title: LMNT 是夏天的答案
highlights.body: 一包 1000 毫克鈉就是為大量流汗跟耐力訓練設計的，這個月營養師的比較一再確認，真的流失電解質時就是要拿它。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 贏在好入口
highlights.body: 較低的 500 毫克鈉、加鉀再加 B 群跟 C，入口又快又順，所以只想單純補水、不想適應怪味的人，我還是推它。

highlights.title: Sports Research 是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: 第三方檢驗加上好價格讓它守住第三。買的是要喝兩個月的一大罐，經過驗證的品質跟每份成本，比華麗的包裝重要多了。

highlights.title: 盯著新面孔
highlights.body: 最近試喝評比在瘋 Freaks of Nature 這類新品，但還沒有哪個帶著足夠數據來撼動名次，所以這輪前十維持不變。

en.commentary: LMNT Recharge stays my number one for the same reason it has held the spot all summer: 1,000mg of sodium, 200mg of potassium, and 60mg of magnesium with zero sugar makes it the clearest, most honest dose on the shelf. That heavy sodium load is exactly what heavy sweaters, endurance athletes, and anyone on strict keto actually needs during July heat, and the transparency on dosing is unmatched. This week's dietitian comparisons keep landing on the same read, giving LMNT the overall edge on transparency and dosing clarity. It is a lot of sodium for someone just sipping at a desk, so I match the recommendation to the use case rather than pretending one stick fits everyone. Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier holds second because its formula is built on the WHO oral rehydration ratio, pairing sodium and glucose to pull water into the body fast, which genuinely helps when you are recovering from illness or a hard session. At around $0.94 a serving it also undercuts LMNT's roughly $1.50, so it earns its value edge. Sports Research Hydrate stays third on the strength of third-party testing and a clean profile at a friendly price. For most readers I point to LMNT when you sweat hard and want a big clean dose, Liquid IV when you want fast rehydration and better taste, and Sports Research when tested purity plus value matter most.

highlights.title: LMNT owns the honest-dose crown
highlights.body: 1,000mg sodium, 200mg potassium, 60mg magnesium, zero sugar. It is the clearest label on the shelf and ideal for heavy sweat in July heat.

highlights.title: Match sodium to the situation
highlights.body: One stick is a lot for desk sipping, so I recommend LMNT for real sweat sessions rather than casual all-day drinking.

highlights.title: Liquid IV nails fast rehydration
highlights.body: Its WHO oral-rehydration ratio pairs sodium and glucose to pull water in quickly, which helps most when recovering from illness or hard exercise.

highlights.title: Liquid IV wins on value and taste
highlights.body: At about $0.94 a serving versus LMNT's roughly $1.50, plus a top taste score, it holds a comfortable second.

highlights.title: Sports Research for tested purity
highlights.body: Strong third-party testing and a clean profile at a friendly price keep it my number three all-rounder.

zh-tw.commentary: LMNT Recharge 這禮拜還是我的第一名，理由跟整個夏天一樣：1,000 毫克鈉、200 毫克鉀、60 毫克鎂，完全零糖，是貨架上最清楚、最誠實的一份劑量。這麼高的鈉量，正是狂流汗的人、耐力運動員、還有嚴格生酮的人在七月熱天真正需要的，而且它在劑量透明度上沒人比得上。這禮拜營養師的比較也都落在同一個看法，LMNT 在透明度跟劑量清晰度上整體勝出。對只是坐在辦公桌前小口喝的人來說，這個鈉量偏多，所以我會照使用情境給建議，不會假裝一條就適合所有人。Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier 守住第二，因為它的配方是照 WHO 口服補液比例做的，鈉跟葡萄糖搭在一起把水快速拉進身體裡，你生病後或練得很硬要恢復時真的很有感。一份差不多台幣 30 塊，比 LMNT 一份約 48 塊便宜，價值分數拿得理所當然。Sports Research Hydrate 守第三，靠的是第三方檢測跟乾淨配方、價格又親民。對大多數讀者我這樣分：狂流汗又想要一份乾淨大劑量選 LMNT，想要快速補水又要好喝選 Liquid IV，最看重檢測純度加划算就挑 Sports Research。

highlights.title: LMNT 拿下誠實劑量王座
highlights.body: 1,000 毫克鈉、200 毫克鉀、60 毫克鎂、零糖，是貨架上最清楚的標示，七月熱天狂流汗超適合。

highlights.title: 鈉量要看情境
highlights.body: 一條對坐辦公桌小口喝的人偏多，所以我推薦 LMNT 給真的在流大汗的場合，不是整天隨便灌。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 快速補水到位
highlights.body: 它照 WHO 口服補液比例把鈉跟葡萄糖搭起來快速拉水進身體，生病後或硬練恢復時最有感。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 贏在划算跟好喝
highlights.body: 一份約台幣 30 塊，比 LMNT 一份約 48 塊便宜，加上口味分數頂尖，第二名坐得很穩。

highlights.title: 檢測純度就選 Sports Research
highlights.body: 扎實的第三方檢測加乾淨配方、價格又親民，讓它穩坐我心中第三名全能款。

en.commentary:
LMNT Recharge stays my top pick for anyone who sweats hard. Each packet carries 1,000 mg of sodium with zero sugar, which is exactly the load endurance athletes and heavy sweaters need to actually replace what they lose. It is the mix I reach for after a long hot session, and this week's dietitian comparisons reaffirmed that high-sodium, clean-ingredient case.

Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier holds second because its balanced sodium-to-potassium ratio and standout taste suit everyday hydration for most people. The sugar-free version in particular keeps winning taste tests, which matters because the best electrolyte mix is the one you will actually drink daily.

Sports Research Hydrate keeps third on the strength of third-party testing and a genuinely strong value per serving. For readers who care about verified label accuracy without paying a premium, it is the responsible middle-ground pick, and reviewers this month kept placing it near the top for exactly that reason.

Below that, Nuun Sport and DripDrop cover the tablet and clinical-ORS niches, so hikers and anyone recovering from real fluid loss have a clear option. New entrants are getting buzz in the wider market, but none of my ranked ten shifted this week. I am holding every rank and score, and pointing heavy sweaters at LMNT while everyday sippers start with Liquid IV.

highlights.title: LMNT for heavy sweaters
highlights.body: 1,000 mg of sodium with zero sugar per packet makes it the mix endurance athletes and salty sweaters should reach for.

highlights.title: Liquid IV for everyday hydration
highlights.body: A balanced sodium-to-potassium ratio and top taste-test scores, especially the sugar-free version, keep it the daily-drinker pick at second.

highlights.title: Sports Research is the tested value
highlights.body: Third-party testing plus strong value per serving keep it third for readers who want verified labels without a premium price.

highlights.title: Niche picks are covered
highlights.body: Nuun Sport handles tablets and DripDrop covers clinical-grade ORS, so hikers and heavy fluid-loss recovery have clear options.

highlights.title: Board holds this week
highlights.body: New market entrants are getting buzz, but none of the ranked ten shifted, so every rank and score stays put.

zh-tw.commentary:
LMNT Recharge 還是我給大汗族的第一名。一包 1,000 毫克鈉、零糖，耐力運動員跟容易大量流汗的人，要補回流失的量就是需要這種配比。夏天跑長距離、練到滿身汗之後，我拿的就是它。這禮拜營養師的比較也再次肯定它高鈉、乾淨成分這條路。

Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier 守第二，因為它鈉鉀比例平衡、味道又突出，對大多數人的日常補水剛好。尤其無糖版一直在盲測拿高分，這很重要，因為最好的電解質粉就是你真的每天願意喝的那一款。

Sports Research Hydrate 保住第三，靠第三方檢測跟每份真的很划算的價格。想要標示準確、又不想付高價的讀者，它是負責任的中間選擇，這個月的評測也一直因為這點把它放在前段。

再往下 Nuun Sport 跟 DripDrop 顧錠劑跟臨床級 ORS 這兩個利基，爬山的人跟真的脫水要補回來的人都有明確選擇。市場上有些新品在紅，但我榜上這十款這禮拜沒有變動。名次跟分數全留，大汗族看 LMNT，日常小口喝的從 Liquid IV 開始。

highlights.title: LMNT 給大汗族
highlights.body: 一包 1,000 毫克鈉、零糖，耐力運動員跟鹹汗體質該拿的就是它。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 顧日常補水
highlights.body: 鈉鉀比例平衡加盲測高分，尤其無糖版，讓它成為每天喝的第二名首選。

highlights.title: Sports Research 是實測性價比
highlights.body: 第三方檢測加每份划算，守第三，給想要標示準確又不想付高價的讀者。

highlights.title: 利基款都有覆蓋
highlights.body: Nuun Sport 顧錠劑、DripDrop 顧臨床級 ORS，爬山跟脫水補回都有明確選擇。

highlights.title: 這週榜單穩
highlights.body: 市場有新品在紅，但榜上十款沒動，名次分數全留。
